author: verify
notes: Tier 3 #11 — staged 'free_bamboo_set.glb' (30 culms, 37834 tris). Normalized 2026-06-25 (step 2): extracted a representative 3-culm clump (bambooBlock 008/011/009 = 9162 tris), re-clustered tight, uniform 0.34 scale to a realistic ~14.3m height, ground-center pivot, 12 textures webp-compressed (5.12MB -> 2.0MB). Visual review on 2026-06-29 rejected the 3-culm static impostor and sparse ground-card workarounds; current bamboo-grove runtime now uses one extracted bambooBlock.009 culm (3054 tris, 333KB) plus a matching 8x3 static impostor so groves are formed by scatter placement. Descriptor: packages/vegetation-library/catalog/bamboo-grove.json (status:ready). Author handle still to be confirmed from the staged set's metadata.
